title: Fix deployment error

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the build/deployment error that occurred in the last deployment attempt. Review all backend Motoko code in backend/main.mo and all frontend TypeScript/React files for compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or any other issues that would cause a build failure, and correct them.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing features continue to work as before

constraints: Do not remove or alter any existing features or functionality
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
